nika trace outputs · the flight recorder
Every task's output, browsable.
run.ndjson 9 tasks
$ nika trace outputs run.ndjson task verb dur tok output discover invoke · nika:glob [36ms] — [5] · 101B digest exec · cat [12ms] — "- feat: nika test — golden testin…" · 324B stats invoke · nika:jq [ 9ms] — {files} · 11B draft infer · mock/echo [ 1ms] 64 "mock(echo) · Draft concise releas…" · 389B translate for_each · 4 items [ 0ms] 288 [4] · 1.8KB survivors invoke · nika:jq [ 5ms] — [4] · 1.8KB verify agent · 1 turns [ 0ms] 556 "mock(echo) · Review these localiz…" · 2.0KB publish exec · printf [31ms] — "published: release notes ready" · 32B report infer · mock/echo [ 0ms] 14 "mock(echo) · One-line ship report…" · 107B 9 task(s) · 101ms · 922 tok · full value: nika trace peek run.ndjson <task>
